strengths: Genuine distributed-systems depth demonstrated at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of low-latency requests per second with real production constraints
Hands-on, current engagement with agentic AI infrastructure including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Consistent polyglot technical breadth across event-driven, microservices, and full-stack domains spanning 17+ years
concerns: No evidence of engineering management or team scaling — the entire career reads as individual contributor (Senior/Staff) with no direct reports, org design, or hiring track record

Fintech exposure is peripheral (investment-practice tooling at RIDE, pricing config at Optilyz) with no demonstrated experience in credit systems, payment flows, regulatory compliance, or auditability infrastructure

AI agent work appears recent (current role only) and contributor-level; there is no evidence of owning or architecting a production multi-agent system with the reliability, evaluation, and observability standards the role demands
response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled and versatile senior/staff individual contributor with credible distributed-systems experience and promising early AI tooling work, but the CTO role is an executive leadership position requiring demonstrated team scaling from 10 to 30+ engineers, board-level communication, production multi-agent AI ownership, and deep fintech-regulatory expertise — none of which are evidenced in this resume, making him a weak fit at this career stage for this specific role.
